options.delta_label_convention: Delta labels (25DC, 25DP, 10DC, 10DP) refer to the BASE currency, EUR. 25DC = 25-delta EUR call (USD put); 25DP = 25-delta EUR put (USD call). Slight positive 25d RR (25DC slightly above 25DP) reflects modest USD-put/EUR-call demand from European exporters hedging USD receivables.
options.liquid_strikes: 10D through 10D; deepest liquidity in G10 FX
options.illiquidity_note: Most liquid currency pair in the world; 2Y+ vol is wide market

notes: USD rates above EUR rates; long EUR earns negative carry (pays USD, receives EUR)
Rate differential is driven by Fed vs ECB divergence — shifts significantly with macro data

market_structure.skew_driver: mild USD-put demand from EUR-based exporters; tail risk from geopolitical events
market_structure.liquidity_profile: deepest FX market globally; 24h liquidity; minimal bid-ask even in size

risk_notes: ECB/Fed divergence: the primary vol driver; sharp repricing on CPI or labour data
Geopolitical risk: European energy shocks, Ukraine conflict escalation spike EUR vol
Safe-haven dynamics: USD strengthens in risk-off; EUR often weakens in stress
Options market: extremely liquid; tight spreads; 1W and 1M are the most actively traded tenors
